notes: Section 1443, acts , title IV, § 443, ; , , , related to manifests and permits for merchandise arriving for delivery in different districts or ports of entry.June 17, 1930, ch. 49746 Stat. 713Pub. L. 91–271, title III, § 301(b)84 Stat. 287June 2, 1970

Section 1444, acts , title IV, § 444, ; , , , required master to report his arrival at another port to a customs officer within twenty-four hours and to produce copies of permit and manifest.June 17, 1930, ch. 49746 Stat. 713Pub. L. 91–271, title III, § 301(b)84 Stat. 287June 2, 1970

Section 1445, acts , title IV, § 445, ; , , , set forth penalties for failure of master to obtain or produce permit or manifest.June 17, 1930, ch. 49746 Stat. 713Pub. L. 91–271, title III, § 301(b)84 Stat. 287June 2, 1970
